rationale: The proposed change concerns the Tax Code homestead exemption amount. Gov't Code §2306.097 governs the Energy Services Program for Low-Income Individuals. The two provisions address unrelated subjects and do not interact.
quote: Sec. 2306.097. ENERGY SERVICES PROGRAM FOR LOW-INCOME INDIVIDUALS.
_note: No overlap between proposed Tax Code §11.13(b) change and Gov't Code §2306.097 energy assistance program provisions.
